query:
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN scheduledDropoffAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER scheduledPickupAt,
  ADD COLUMN pickupContactName VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER scheduledDropoffAt,
  ADD COLUMN pickupContactPhone VARCHAR(30) NULL AFTER pickupContactName,
  ADD COLUMN dropoffContactName VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER pickupContactPhone,
  ADD COLUMN dropoffContactPhone VARCHAR(30) NULL AFTER dropoffContactName,
  ADD COLUMN customerName VARCHAR(100) NULL AFTER dropoffContactPhone,
  ADD COLUMN travelRouteData JSON NULL AFTER customerName;
